SwitchPreference.android:title: Infinite Forward
SwitchPreference.android:summary: [BUTTON NOT WORKING, UNDER DEV] Forward D-Mails for the same contact infinitely

SwitchPreference.android:title: D-Mail Size
SwitchPreference.android:summary: [BUTTON NOT WORKING, UNDER DEV] Reduce long text's to a D-Mail default size (36 bytes)

SwitchPreference.android:title: Text Hang
SwitchPreference.android:summary: [BUTTON NOT WORKING, UNDER DEV] Makes Steins;Zapp immune to text hangs

SwitchPreference.android:title: Link Hang
SwitchPreference.android:summary: [BUTTON NOT WORKING, UNDER DEV] Makes Steins;Zapp immune to link hangs

SwitchPreference.android:title: Contact Hang
SwitchPreference.android:summary: [BUTTON NOT WORKING, UNDER DEV] Makes Steins;Zapp immune to contact hangs

SwitchPreference.android:title: Image Hang
SwitchPreference.android:summary: [BUTTON NOT WORKING, UNDER DEV] Makes Steins;Zapp immune to image hangs

SwitchPreference.android:title: File Hang
SwitchPreference.android:summary: [BUTTON NOT WORKING, UNDER DEV] Makes Steins;Zapp immune to file hangs

SwitchPreference.android:title: Location Hang
SwitchPreference.android:summary: [BUTTON NOT WORKING, UNDER DEV] Makes Steins;Zapp immune to location hangs

SwitchPreference.android:title: Catalog Hang
SwitchPreference.android:summary: [BUTTON NOT WORKING, UNDER DEV] Makes Steins;Zapp immune to catalog hangs
